name: PostgreSQL Observability
author: OpsDB Platform
description: Monitor PostgreSQL databases including performance metrics, connection activity, query analysis, storage health, vacuum state, and replication lag.

postgres.activity_locks.description: Active sessions, waiting sessions, idle-in-transaction, and blocked lock counts.
postgres.activity_locks.query: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'active') AS active_sessions, count(*) FILTER (WHERE wait_event_type IS NOT NULL) AS waiting_sessions, count(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'idle in transaction') AS idle_in_transaction_sessions, (SELECT count(*) FROM pg_locks WHERE NOT granted) AS blocked_locks FROM pg_stat_activity

postgres.global_stats.description: Cache hit ratio, transaction counts, deadlocks, temp usage, database size, and XID age.
postgres.global_stats.query: SELECT coalesce(d.numbackends, 0) AS active_sessions, coalesce(d.xact_commit + d.xact_rollback, 0) AS total_transactions, CASE WHEN coalesce(d.blks_hit + d.blks_read, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE round((d.blks_hit::numeric * 100.0) / nullif(d.blks_hit + d.blks_read, 0), 2) END AS cache_hit_percent, coalesce(d.deadlocks, 0) AS deadlocks, coalesce(d.temp_files, 0) AS temp_files, coalesce(d.temp_bytes, 0) AS temp_bytes, pg_database_size(current_database()) AS current_database_size_bytes, age(pg.datfrozenxid) AS max_freeze_age FROM pg_stat_database d JOIN pg_database pg ON pg.datname = d.datname WHERE d.datname = current_database()

postgres.storage_vacuum.description: Live/dead tuple counts, dead tuple percentage, and vacuum/autovacuum run counts.
postgres.storage_vacuum.query: SELECT coalesce(sum(n_live_tup), 0) AS live_tuples, coalesce(sum(n_dead_tup), 0) AS dead_tuples, CASE WHEN coalesce(sum(n_live_tup + n_dead_tup), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE round((sum(n_dead_tup)::numeric * 100.0) / nullif(sum(n_live_tup + n_dead_tup), 0), 2) END AS dead_tuple_percent, coalesce(sum(vacuum_count), 0) AS vacuum_count, coalesce(sum(autovacuum_count), 0) AS autovacuum_count FROM pg_stat_user_tables

cache_hit_ratio_low.title: Cache Hit Ratio Low
cache_hit_ratio_low.recommendation: Review shared buffers, query patterns, and index usage for excessive disk reads.

dead_tuples_high.title: Dead Tuples High
dead_tuples_high.recommendation: Review autovacuum health, long transactions, and tables with high dead tuple percentages.

replication_lag_high.title: Replication Lag High
replication_lag_high.recommendation: Check replica connectivity, WAL shipping, replication slots, and downstream apply delay.
